articles.title: Arsenal trio & Fernandes on PFA men's player of the year shortlist
articles.summary: Declan Rice, Gabriel, David Raya, Bruno Fernandes, Erling Haaland and Rayan Cherki are nominated for the Professional Footballers' Association men's player of the year award.

articles.title: Messi v Ronaldo: A rivalry that's dominated for two decades
articles.summary: Cristiano Ronaldo and Lionel Messi have been at the top of the game for the past 20 years, BBC Sport looks at a rivalry that has shaped football.

articles.title: Shaw and Hasegawa on PFA women's award shortlist
articles.summary: Manchester City duo Khadija 'Bunny' Shaw and Yui Hasegawa are shortlisted for the Professional Footballers Association's Women's Player of the Year award.

articles.title: St Mirren appoint McLeish on three-year deal
articles.summary: Craig McLeish believes his background with St Mirren's academy makes him the best choice as manager after agreeing a three-year deal.

articles.title: We need to teach boys differently to girls - Southgate
articles.summary: The former England manager has made a documentary looking at the issues affecting boys and young men.

articles.title: McLeish appointed permanent St Mirren boss
articles.summary: St Mirren have appointed Craig McLeish as permanent boss after he led them to Scottish Premiership survival.

articles.title: Potter finding joy with Sweden after Chelsea and West Ham woe
articles.summary: It is more than two months since Viktor Gyokeres's 89th-minute goal sealed Sweden's extraordinary World Cup play-off victory over Poland at a delirious Strawberry Arena in Stockholm, but Graham Potter...

articles.title: From a tiny changing room to Nou Camp - 'Catalans driving RL revival in France'
articles.summary: On Saturday, Catalans Dragons will face Wigan Warriors at the Stade Jean Bouin in Paris for a Super League contest, 20 years on from their arrival into the competition.

articles.title: Celtic fan groups state opposition to Keane
articles.summary: Several Celtic supporters clubs put their names to a statement opposing the potential appointment of Robbie Keane as manager because of the Irishman's previous role as Maccabi Tel Aviv head coach.

articles.title: Man Utd will not be swayed on transfer plan - Berrada
articles.summary: Manchester United chief executive Omar Berrada says the club will not bow to pressure and overpay in the summer transfer window.

articles.title: Why has Iraola only signed a two-year contract at Liverpool?
articles.summary: Our Ask Me Anything team looks into why Andoni Iraola has signed a contract for just two years as Liverpool manager.

articles.title: WSL has 'the edge' to attract Europe's best players
articles.summary: England defender Lucy Bronze says the Women's Super League has "the edge" of improving each year so is able to attract Europe's best players.

articles.title: Two goals in 41 games - what next for Delap at Chelsea?
articles.summary: A year after striker Liam Delap joined Chelsea, he struggled to prove himself during an underwhelming and injury-hit season.

articles.title: Hodgkinson sets 400m personal best at Diamond League in Rome
articles.summary: Keely Hodgkinson claimed a personal best as she finished seventh on her women's 400m Diamond League debut in Rome.

articles.title: Rivals: Messi v Ronaldo - watch the trailer
articles.summary: The story of how Lionel Messi v Cristiano Ronaldo became the rivalry that transformed football and defined a generation.

articles.summary: English football's independent regulator faces a "defining test" as Saudi Arabian government official Turki Al-Sheikh attempts to invest in Derby County, says Amnesty International.

articles.title: Fifa demands fans pay after ticketing error offered free World Cup tickets
articles.summary: Fifa says fans who were mistakenly given free tickets to World Cup group stage matches in Toronto must pay for them within seven days or lose the seats.

articles.summary: Fifa has unveiled what it describes as a new "unique, immersive experience" pre-match ceremony for all matches at the 2026 World Cup.
